commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b968e89cfb07f7a12210e13b039fe06029d2ef74)
commands.review_summary:
The PR reorders the release publish workflow so postpublish verification runs before GitHub release/proof creation, adds a `--skip-github-release` verifier mode, adds an incomplete-public-release guard, and updates release-maintainer skill guidance.

PR surface: Tests +12, Docs +14, Config +33, Other +9. Total +68 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: on the PR head, the workflow verifies before creating the GitHub release, while `docs/reference/RELEASING.md` still documents the old release-page-before-verification order. I did not run the workflow because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The docs mismatch is concrete, but the draft maintainer release workflow change also needs release-owner judgment about the new retry semantics before merge.

target.title: fix(release): gate beta publish on plugin verification
target.body:
## Summary

- gate `openclaw-release-publish.yml` so the GitHub release page is created and proof is appended only after postpublish verification succeeds
- fail early when a public release already exists for the tag without verification evidence for the current target SHA
- temporarily make `llama-cpp` source-checkout-only by removing npm/ClawHub publish/install/catalog/docs surfaces until the first package publish is prepared
- update release maintainer instructions to preflight newly publishable plugin packages before tagging/publishing

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-memory-search.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/embeddings.test.ts extensions/llama-cpp/index.test.ts test/scripts/release-beta-verifier.test.ts test/scripts/package-acceptance-workflow.test.ts src/plugins/bundled-plugin-naming.test.ts src/plugins/official-external-plugin-catalog.test.ts test/plugin-npm-release.test.ts test/plugin-clawhub-release.test.ts test/scripts/list-prod-store-packages.test.ts`
- `node scripts/generate-plugin-inventory-doc.mjs --check`
- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `ruby -e 'require "yaml"; YAML.load_file(".github/workflows/openclaw-release-publish.yml"); puts "workflow yaml ok"'`
- `node -e 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("docs/docs.json","utf8")); console.log("docs json ok")'`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/release/2026.6.6`
- `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run -provider azure -class Standard_D4ads_v6 -- env OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 OPENCLAW_CHANGED_LANES_RAW_SYNC=1 corepack pnpm check:changed` (`cbx_bb90342a999f`, `jade-crayfish`)

## Notes

- `@openclaw/llama-cpp-provider` is not present on npm yet; this PR hides public install instructions rather than telling users to install a 404.
- Local npm dist-tag promotion is still blocked on this machine because npm auth and 1Password are not signed in.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
